vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd

triage_decision.reason: Modifying /etc/passwd permissions to 0644 is a standard STIG hardening measure that does not impact SSH/console access or critical services, aligning with safe_to_remediate criteria for file permissions.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; low risk file permission modification
